sections.title: When using the smelt option on the nearby furnace

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: That furnace is the property of the Red Axe! Hands off!

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: That furnace is my property! Hands off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Didn't all this belong to the Red Axe? And weren't you a member?

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: I don't know what you're talking about.

sections.title: When using an item on the nearby furnace

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: Who do you think are, coming in here and using the property of the Red Axe!

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: Who do you think are, coming in here and using my property?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Didn't all this belong to the Red Axe? And weren't you a member?

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: I don't know what you're talking about.

sections.title: When using an item on the nearby fireplace

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: Hands off! That fireplace belongs to the Red Axe, not some puny arrogant human!

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: Hands off! That fireplace belongs to me! Not some puny arrogant human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Didn't all this belong to the Red Axe? And weren't you a member?

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: I don't know what you're talking about.

sections.title: When using an item on the nearby sink

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: Who gave you permission to use that?

lines.speaker: Vigr
lines.text: Can you wield a warhammer? If not, then go away.
